title: 'Attacks stopped cold': FBI says it thwarted 'potential threat' to White House UFC event
summary_full: The FBI announced the thwarting of an alleged plot targeting the UFC America 250 event at the White House. Multiple suspects were taken into custody following a multi-state operation after authorities became aware of the threat days before the event. Law enforcement agencies are credited with preventing planned attacks.
